response.justification: Sarah Smith brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience and demonstrated ability to operate in high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows virtually no alignment with the core domain of this role. There is no evidence of experimentation platform development, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry foundations, rollout-risk management, or growth engineering. The current title is Senior Software Developer, well below the Principal/IC6 seniority required, and there is no demonstrated cross-team technical leadership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad language portfolio (C, C++, Java, TypeScript, C#) aligns with the required technical stack across 15+ years of continuous engineering work
Proven experience in high-scale, low-latency distributed systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Active open-source contributor and community educator (workshops, conference talks, multiple published libraries), indicating strong technical communication skills
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform development, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the primary technical domain of the role
No telemetry foundations, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/data analysis background apparent anywhere in the resume
Current and recent titles are Senior/Staff SWE with no indication of Principal-level cross-team architectural ownership or IC6-equivalent scope of impact
